title: 25-lesson milestone
text: I can type. I can read what I type. I write sentences. I ask questions. I share happy news. I am a little writer now! Yay!

tips.text: You are a real little writer

tips.target: I can type. I can read what I type. I write sentences. I
ask questions. I share happy news. I am a little writer now! Yay!

character_tips.anna: 🎯 Halfway, little friend! You're doing AMAZING.
character_tips.knopych: 🏔️ HALFWAY UP THE MOUNTAIN! Look back, look proud!
character_tips.klavochka: Halfway to your crown, my sunshine ⭐⭐
